description: Legal document. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (per Weiss). Abū al-Wafāʾ Shemarya al-Dallāl receives a release from Abū l-Mufaḍḍal and his sister Nasab for all obligations resulting from dealings with their late father. Two witnesses, Abū l-Ḥasan Elʿazar b. Nuṣayr and Abū l-Munā, were brought by Abū l-Wafāʾ to testify. There is also someone called al-Bilbaysī. No signatures preserved. (Information from Gershon Weiss and from Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
